diagrams.title: Basic RNN Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the recurrent structure of a basic RNN with input, hidden state, and output at each time step, illustrating how information flows through time
elements: Recurrent connection from ht-1 to ht
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential processing and temporal dependencies

diagrams.title: LSTM Cell Architecture
diagrams.description: Detailed view of LSTM showing forget gate, input gate, output gate, cell state, and how they interact to control information flow
diagrams.purpose: Understanding gating mechanisms for long-term memory

diagrams.title: Sequence-to-Sequence with Attention
diagrams.description: Encoder-decoder architecture showing how attention computes context vector at each decoder step by attending to encoder states
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how attention solves the bottleneck problem in Seq2Seq models
